## Describe the Bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

---

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

---

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

---

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include any error messages, console output, or screenshots.

---

## Environment

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| DotShare Auth version | e.g. 1.3.0 |
| Platform affected | LinkedIn / X / Facebook / Reddit / All |
| Browser | e.g. Chrome 123, Firefox 124 |
| OS | e.g. Ubuntu 24, Windows 11, macOS 15 |
| Deployment | Vercel / Railway / Local |
| Node.js version | e.g. 20.11.0 |

---

## Deep Link Received (if applicable)

If the bug is related to the VS Code redirect, paste the deep link here (redact your actual token):

vscode://freerave.dotshare/auth?platform=x&access_token=REDACTED&expires_in=7200

---

## Additional Context

Any other context, logs, or screenshots that might help.
